Package org.eventb.core.ast

Class DefaultFilter

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.DefaultFilter
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFormulaFilter, IFormulaFilter2
Direct Known Subclasses:
FunImgSimpImpl.FunImgSimpFilter
public class DefaultFilter extends Object implements IFormulaFilter2
Implementation of a default filter that does not select any sub-formula. Provides a basis for implementing simple filters by sub-classing.

Clients may extend this class.

Since:
1.0

      public boolean select(AssociativeExpression expression)
      Description copied from interface: IFormulaFilter
      Tells whether the given expression passes this filter criterion.

      Returns:
      true iff the given expression passes the criterion
